_meta.source: perks/weapons: darkanddarker.wiki.spellsandguns.com/Druid; base stats & skills: api.darkerdb.com/v1/classes (merged by scripts/build-classes.mjs)
_meta.note: Shapeshift forms and spell system are out of scope for the stat engine.

name: Druid
perk_slot_rule: 1 slot + 1 additional slot every 5 levels; 4 slots at level 15 (max)

perks.name: Dreamwalk
perks.effect: +5 Magical Power for 3s and become spiritual: phase through targets, invulnerable

perks.name: Enhanced Wildness
perks.effect: In animal form: +5% Physical Power Bonus and +20 Armor Rating

perks.name: Force of Nature
perks.effect: +5 Physical Power for 3s on each tick of received healing

perks.name: Herbal Sensing
perks.effect: Detect herbs within 8m; +150 Luck when harvesting herbs

perks.name: Lifebloom Aura
perks.effect: +1 Health per tick to target when healing self or allies within 6m; disables Shapeshifting

perks.name: Natural Healing
perks.effect: Heal self and allies within 6m for 1 Magical Base Healing every 3s

perks.name: Shapeshift Mastery
perks.effect: -25% shapeshift time and -25% Wild skill cooldowns; prevents Spirit spells

perks.name: Spirit Bond
perks.effect: Transfer 20% of damage received by a party member within 6m to yourself (up to 20 per instance)

perks.name: Spirit Magic Mastery
perks.effect: +10 Magical Power when casting Spirit magic

perks.name: Sun and Moon
perks.effect: Self and allies within 6m gain +3 Vigor and +5 Magical Power

perks.name: Thorn Coat
perks.effect: Return 5 True Physical Base Damage to melee attackers

skills.name: Shapeshift Memory
skills.effect: Transforms into the selected creature. Tools cannot be used in a non-human state.

skills.name: Shapeshift Memory II
skills.effect: Transforms into the selected creature. Tools cannot be used in a non-human state.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.effect: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.effect: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.
